title: Infosys incorporates step-down wholly-owned subsidiary Infosys BPM Canada Inc.
detailed_summary: Infosys incorporated a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Infosys BPM Canada Inc., in Canada on July 28, 2025. The entity has share capital of CAD 10 and is in the Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry. The document does not disclose revenue, consideration, approvals, or any stated financial or strategic impact.

key_facts.fact: Infosys incorporated a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary named Infosys BPM Canada Inc. in Canada.
Infosys BPM Canada Inc. has share capital of CAD 10 and turnover is not applicable.
100% of the shareholding is held by Infosys BPM UK Limited, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys incorporated Infosys BPM Canada Inc. as a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary in Canada; 100% of the shareholding is held by Infosys BPM UK Limited.
